audit_items.proof_trace: The inner uint64 subtraction (startingPriceMultiplier - endingPriceMultiplier) cannot underflow because _applyAssetParamsUpdates (the sole setter of s_assetParams) enforces endingPriceMultiplier <= startingPriceMultiplier at L653. elapsedTime is clamped to auctionDuration at L785, bounding the mulDiv ratio to ≤ 1 so the result never exceeds the minuend; auctionDuration != 0 is enforced at L647, preventing division by zero. Solady FixedPointMathLib.mulDiv uses 512-bit intermediates and Solidity 0.8.26 checked arithmetic provides a final backstop.
